hooks.description: Check for hardcoded direct resource type magic strings in .go files
Remind to rebuild RST HTML docs when source .rst files are edited
Warn about log-then-return anti-pattern in .go files
Verify Alembic migration table names exist in dbhandler code
Block UUID columns declared as VARCHAR(36) in Alembic migrations — must be BINARY(16)
Run scripts/check-docs.sh after edits to root CLAUDE.md or docs/* to catch root CLAUDE.md regrowth and missing category READMEs
Warn when service source files (listenhandler, subscribeTargets, config, models) are edited without updating the corresponding docs/*.md
